programs.title: Road Wars
programs.desc: At a red light in Phoenix, a man gets out of his car to confront another motorist, who ends up driving directly into him; when a large truck slows traffic on a small road in New Jersey, an angry driver gets out of his car with a baseball bat.

programs.title: Road Wars
programs.desc: A New York City driver gets into a brutal street fight with an electric unicycler after allegedly cutting him off; a motorcyclist risks his own life to help a driver with a stalled car get off the highway.

programs.title: Road Wars
programs.desc: Drivers in Harlem hurl insults during an intense standoff over a parking spot. In England, bystanders intervene when two boys appear to take a motorbike that doesn't belong to them. On a Minnesota highway, a wrong-way driver leaves a ten-mile path of destruction. Drivers in Thailand face the wrath of a road raging beast.

programs.title: Road Wars
programs.desc: A driver in Los Angeles squares off with a group of cyclists in a battle over the right-of-way; a motorcyclist in Arkansas pursues a driver he believes left the scene of an accident; after a fender bender in China, a woman gets physical.

programs.title: Road Wars
programs.desc: A sideswipe on a Texas freeway leads to a heated confrontation; a motorist rear-ends a biker in Australia, then snatches his bag; a pedestrian takes a swing at a trooper on a Florida highway; a right-of-way mix-up causes a collision in Texas; a California woman discovers a wild bear trapped inside her SUV; a driver in Turkey tries to chase down a tow truck that seized his car.

programs.title: Road Wars
programs.desc: A traffic jam spat on a California freeway between a motorcyclist and driver turns destructive; in Minnesota, two bicyclists square off with a driver over a right-of-way dispute; a pickup towing a multi-ton drum in Alabama inadvertently releases its payload into oncoming traffic; wildfire fighters in California race to escape an inferno.
